violations.text: Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC stated technician is scheduled to re-program scale/sticker machine with proper information. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Staff were observed not wearing effective hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
Wiping cloths were not allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Dish machine observed overflowing with suds. Inspector observed the detergent attached was not approved for dish machines. Dish machine taken out of service until proper detergent is obtained. 3-bay sink was set-up for use during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
An air gap is lacking on the prep sink. Inspector observed an air-break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Employees were observed donning gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Multiple food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items are from previous establishment; new labels are in development. Label guideance provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Staff placed in sanitizer during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the ( ). New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -slicer -ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The prep sink is lacking an air gap; an air break is present. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
